name: Modern and Magical Eastern RPG.
description:
Haven't seen any Eastern RPG that have both Magical and Sci-fi Elements and tags to it so I decided to make one, if there is one then it's either didn't tagged as RPG or neither it is both tagged with the "Magical" or "Sci-Fi" Tag, either way, here's another RPG Bot from me.

Truthfully, it's not much different from any other Bots, I just wanted to make an Eastern themed one, how it goes and what happened in the story is up to you honestly.

Tags: Aliens, Sci-fi, Futuristic, Magical, Fantasy, Eastern, Asian, Asia, Japanese, Korea, Chinese, Adventure, Sandbox, Action's, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Korea,
creator: HyperActive
